commands.review_summary:
The PR updates the zh-TW Control UI locale, translation memory, and glossary entries to use Taiwan-standard terminology while preserving the existing locale key shape.

PR surface: Source +84. Total +84 across 3 files.

Reproducibility: yes. for the source-level issue: current main visibly contains the terminology the PR replaces in ui/src/i18n/locales/zh-TW.ts. I did not run the Control UI, so runtime proof still needs to come from the contributor or a maintainer proof lane.
commands.review_followup: The remaining blocker is contributor-owned real behavior proof and human language review, not a narrow code repair that automation can safely supply.

target.title: i18n(zh-TW): align Control UI locale with Taiwan-standard terminology
target.body:
## Summary

The `zh-TW` Control UI locale on `main` still uses a number of mainland-China terms that are not idiomatic Traditional Chinese (Taiwan). Key parity is already complete (1228/1228), so this is a focused **terminology** pass — no key additions, no string-shape churn.

This supersedes the auto-closed #52357 with a much narrower, fully-verified scope.

## Terminology changes

| English | before (CN) | after (TW) |
|---|---|---|
| instance | 實例 | 執行個體 |
| session | 會話 | 工作階段 |
| settings | 設置 | 設定 |
| user | 用戶 | 使用者 |
| default | 默認 | 預設 |
| online | 在線 | 線上 |
| key | 密鑰 | 金鑰 |
| signal | 信號 | 訊號 |
| refresh | 刷新 | 重新整理 |
| run | 運行 | 執行 |
| message | 消息 | 訊息 |
| info | 信息 | 資訊 |
| data | 數據 | 資料 |
| add | 添加 | 新增 |
| debug | 調試 | 偵錯 |
| track | 跟蹤 | 追蹤 |
| audio | 音頻 | 音訊 |
| interface | 界面 | 介面 |
| wizard | 向導 | 精靈 |
| click | 點擊 | 點按 |
| access | 訪問 | 存取 |
| docs | 文檔 | 文件 |
| store | 存儲 | 儲存 |
| device | 設備 | 裝置 |
| link | 鏈接 | 連結 |
| identify | 標識 | 識別 |

- Normalized `網關`/`閘道` → **Gateway** to match the existing brand glossary (`Gateway` is kept in English).
- Added these term families to `glossary.zh-TW.json` so future regenerations keep the reviewed strings instead of reverting to cached mainland terms. **Deliberately excluded polysemous words** — e.g. `key` (could wrongly force 金鑰 on "shortcut key") and `signal` (collides with the **Signal** channel, which the prompt keeps in English).
- `docs`/documentation strings already correctly use 文件 (document) and are intentionally left unchanged. `用戶端` (client), `連接` (connect), `標籤` (tab) are valid Taiwan usage and untouched.

## Files

- `ui/src/i18n/locales/zh-TW.ts`
- `ui/src/i18n/.i18n/zh-TW.tm.jsonl`
- `ui/src/i18n/.i18n/glossary.zh-TW.json`

## Verification

- `pnpm ui:i18n:sync --locale zh-TW` and `pnpm ui:i18n:sync` — clean, idempotent (TW terms are not reverted on regen)
- `pnpm ui:i18n:check` — clean
- `node scripts/run-vitest.mjs ui/src/i18n/test/translate.test.ts` — 1 file / 11 tests passed
- `pnpm ui:build` — passed
- Reviewed by a native zh-TW (Taiwan) speaker for terminology and context (e.g. confirming docs vs. file disambiguation).
target.author: p3nchan
